pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 10; task.json description; verified through Docker image verification system
task.json description step 4; export_result.sh line 96 checks for 'apk add gettext'; Alpine Linux official package documentation confirms gettext provides envsubst
setup_task.sh lines 25-32 create config.js; line 83 copies with 'COPY app/ /usr/share/nginx/html/'; export_result.sh line 62 reads from this path
setup_task.sh lines 48-76 create nginx.conf; line 86 copies with 'COPY nginx/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf'; export_result.sh line 68 reads from this path
setup_task.sh line 80; official Docker Hub nginx repository confirms this image exists
task.json description step 2; export_result.sh lines 33-34 define TEST_API_URL and TEST_WORKERS; lines 45-46 pass as -e flags to docker run

task.json description step 3 'Ensure envsubst does NOT replace internal Nginx variables like $uri or $host'; setup_task.sh lines 66 and 72 include these variables; export_result.sh lines 78-79 verify they are preserved

privileged_info_summary: The task configures an acme-dashboard Docker image using nginx:1.24-alpine with runtime environment variable injection. The project directory is /home/ga/projects/acme-dashboard. Two configuration files are targeted: config.js at /usr/share/nginx/html/config.js (to inject API_URL) and nginx.conf at /etc/nginx/nginx.conf (to inject WORKER_PROCESSES). The gettext package must be installed to provide envsubst. Critical requirement: envsubst must preserve nginx internal variables ($uri, $host) using proper escaping syntax. Verification uses randomized test values to ensure injection is dynamic, not hardcoded.
